description: WhatsApp DM policy set to open

finding.title: WhatsApp DM policy is open
finding.detail: channels.whatsapp.dmPolicy=open means any WhatsApp user can send commands to your agent.
finding.remediation: Set channels.whatsapp.dmPolicy=allowlist and enumerate trusted numbers in dmAllowlist.

description: Telegram DM policy set to open

finding.title: Telegram DM policy is open
finding.detail: channels.telegram.dmPolicy=open means any Telegram user can DM your agent.
finding.remediation: Set channels.telegram.dmPolicy=allowlist and enumerate trusted Telegram user IDs.

description: Telegram group policy set to open

finding.title: Telegram group policy is open
finding.detail: channels.telegram.groupPolicy=open means any Telegram group can add and command your agent.
finding.remediation: Set channels.telegram.groupPolicy=allowlist and specify allowed group IDs.

finding.title: Discord DM policy is open
finding.detail: channels.discord.dmPolicy=open means any Discord user can DM your agent.
finding.remediation: Set channels.discord.dmPolicy=allowlist or off. Document permitted DM users.

finding.title: Discord group/guild policy is open
finding.detail: channels.discord.groupPolicy=open means any Discord server can add and use your agent.
finding.remediation: Set channels.discord.groupPolicy=allowlist and restrict to specific guild IDs.

description: Open group policy with elevated tools enabled

finding.title: Open groupPolicy with elevated tools enabled
finding.detail: An open channel group policy is active while elevated tools are enabled. Prompt injection in those rooms can become a high-impact incident.
finding.remediation: Set groupPolicy=allowlist and keep elevated allowlists extremely tight.

description: Open group policy with runtime/filesystem tools exposed

finding.title: Open groupPolicy with runtime/filesystem tools exposed
finding.detail: An open channel group policy is active while runtime and/or filesystem tools are exposed without full sandboxing.
finding.remediation: For open groups, prefer tools.profile="messaging" (or deny runtime/fs groups), set tools.fs.workspaceOnly=true, and use agents.defaults.sandbox.mode="all" for exposed agents.

description: Discord open group policy with thread-based subagent spawning enabled

finding.title: Discord can spawn subagent sessions from open groups
finding.detail: channels.discord.groupPolicy=open and threadBindings.spawnSubagentSessions=true allows untrusted Discord servers to trigger subagent session creation.
finding.remediation: Set channels.discord.groupPolicy=allowlist and disable threadBindings.spawnSubagentSessions unless explicitly required and authenticated.
